---
title: ""
---

![](images/myphoto.png){width="180px"}

# Md Nazmul Islam

## Veterinary Epidemiology and Infectious Diseases

I am a veterinary researcher and graduate student in the **Department of Medicine, Bangladesh Agricultural University**. My work focuses on **veterinary epidemiology, infectious diseases in livestock, and One Health research**, with interests in epidemiological data analysis and evidence synthesis.

[About](about.qmd) \| [CV](cv.qmd) \| [Projects](projects.qmd) \| [Publications](publications.qmd) \| [Teaching](teaching.qmd) \| [Blog](blog.qmd)
